segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Listen to a talk on a science podcast.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Let's move on in our renewable energy series to discuss solar power, which is arguably the most abundant resource available.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Solar power takes energy from the sun's rays and converts it to electricity or heat.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: The primary technology for this is solar panels made up of photovoltaic cells, which generate an electric current when sunlight hits them.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: The advantages of solar power are well known, and the most important may be the fact that it produces zero harmful pollutants.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Any industrial endeavor will produce carbon dioxide in one way or another, and manufacturing solar panels itself requires energy sourced from fossil fuels.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: But on the whole, the industry has a much lower carbon footprint than coal or natural gas, and this makes it key to reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Another advantage, and one we don't talk about enough, is that solar power can provide access in remote and underserved areas far from the grid.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Solar panel efficiency is affected by cloud cover and other weather, which of course reduces the amount of sunlight reaching the panels.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: That said, innovations in battery storage systems do allow for the storage of solar energy for use during non-sunny periods.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Panel lifespan is quite good at 25 to 30 years, but improvements in efficiency are paradoxically driving panels to be replaced much earlier than that.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: This is increasing faster than expected.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: This is a problem because recycling them is expensive and most panels end up in landfills.
